title: Securing Your Email Account
content:
Your email account is the gateway to your digital life. If someone gains access to your email, they can reset passwords for almost all of your other accounts. Here are some essential steps to secure your email account.

Recommended Tools

  • ProtonMail: A secure email service with built-in end-to-end encryption and state-of-the-art security features.
  • Bitwarden: A trusted open-source password manager to generate and store strong, unique passwords for your email accounts.
